fields.name: KFC
fields.cuisine: Hot & Crispy Chicken: The signature bone-in pieces, marinated and double-breaded for maximum crunch.

fields.name: Chicken Restaurants
fields.cuisine: Western styles often favor deep frying and grilling, while Eastern traditions highlight braising, slow-simmered curries, and marinades

fields.name: Veg Restaurant | Bangaluru
fields.cuisine: Paneer Butter Masala, Kadai Paneer, or Chana Masala.

fields.name: Friend's Cafe
fields.cuisine: Fast food classics like burgers, sandwiches, and quick snacks

fields.name: biriyani palace
fields.description: best biriyani in banglore

fields.name: KFC Crispy Fried Chicken Recipe
fields.description: The chicken is marinated with spices, coated in seasoned flour, and deep-fried until golden and crunchy

fields.name: Smoky Red Chicken
fields.description: A lighter, flame-grilled option marinated in aromatic spices.

fields.name: Chocolate Cake
fields.description: Rich, indulgent cake made with cocoa powder and usually topped with chocolate or vanilla frosting.

fields.name: Paneer Butter Masala
fields.description: Paneer Butter Masala is a popular North Indian dish featuring soft paneer cubes in a rich, creamy, and mildly sweet tomato-onion gravy.

fields.name: sweet flatbread
fields.description: made of a thin wheat dough wrapper stuffed with a sweet filling of lentils (chana dal) or coconut cooked with jaggery and cardamom, then roasted on a griddle with plenty of ghee.

fields.name: Hot & Crispy Chicken
fields.description: Finger-licking classic pressure-fried chicken available in 2, 4, 6, or 8-piece buckets.

fields.name: Chicken Popcorn
fields.description: Bite-sized, crunchy boneless chicken nuggets available in regular, medium, and large sizes.

fields.name: Peri Peri Chicken Strips
fields.description: Tender, boneless chicken strips dusted with spicy peri peri seasoning.

fields.name: Hot Wings
fields.description: Spiced, crispy chicken wings perfect for side snacking.

fields.name: Hyderabadi Biryani
fields.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with raw marinated meat (Kutchi style), heavy saffron, and fried onions.

fields.name: Ambur Biryani
fields.description: Made with short-grain Seeraga Samba rice and a curd-and-mint-based meat paste, offering a subtle, less spicy flavor profile.

fields.name: Thalassery Biryani
fields.description: A Malabar classic using tiny Kaima rice, generous amounts of ghee, and fried cashews and raisins.

fields.name: Dindigul Biryani
fields.description: A tangy Tamil Nadu variant featuring Seeraga Samba rice, cubes of meat, and a heavy dose of pepper and lemon.

fields.name: UttaraKannada Biryani
fields.description: A coastal Karnataka style where meat is cooked in a heavy onion and green chili masala, entirely omitting curd.

fields.name: Kolkata Biryani
fields.description: A spin-off of the Awadhi style, characterized by a sweet aroma, light spices, and the iconic addition of boiled potatoes and eggs.

fields.name: Lucknowi (Awadhi) Biryani
fields.description: A highly sophisticated, low-spice Pukki biryani where meat is cooked in a rich broth (yakhni) before being layered with rice.

fields.name: Moradabadi Biryani
fields.description: A pale, pulao-like biryani from Uttar Pradesh cooked with whole spices, green chilies, and minimal yogurt or turmeric.

fields.name: Donne Biryani
fields.description: A local Bengaluru/Karnataka favorite made with short-grain Jeeraga Sambha rice, a heavy coriander-mint green paste, and traditionally served in eco-friendly leaf bowls (donnes).

fields.name: Rice and Sambar
fields.description:
The Rice: Usually soft-cooked white rice, acting as the perfect base.
The Sambar: A thick soup made from boiled pigeon peas (toor dal) and tangy tamarind extract.

fields.name: Rice | Sambar
fields.description: Flavored with a roasted spice blend (sambar powder) including coriander seeds, cumin, and fenugreek

fields.name: Paneer Biryani
fields.description: Replaces or supplements vegetables with marinated cubes of cottage cheese.

fields.name: Kayi Holige (Coconut Obbattu)
fields.description: The filling uses fresh, juicy grated coconut cooked down with jaggery or sugar. It yields a distinct, rich texture but has a shorter shelf life than the dal version.

fields.name: Sponge Cake
fields.description: Made by whipping whole eggs or egg yolks with sugar, then folding in flour. It absorbs syrups and liquids beautifully, making it perfect for roll cakes.

fields.name: Flourless Chocolate Cake
fields.description: A dense, fudgy cake made without flour, relying on whipped egg whites or a baked chocolate-and-egg custard for structure

fields.name: Chiffon Cake
fields.description: A hybrid cake. It uses whipped egg whites for a foam-like lightness, but adds vegetable oil and egg yolks for the moist richness of a butter cake.

fields.name: Angel Food Cake
fields.description: Made using only whipped egg whites, sugar, and flour (no yolks, no fat). It is baked in an ungreased tube pan to yield a snowy-white, spongy texture.

fields.name: Butter Chicken
fields.description: Tandoori-grilled chicken pieces simmered in a smooth, mild, creamy tomato and butter sauce.

fields.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
fields.description: Roasted chunks of marinated chicken in a spicy, creamy, orange-colored tomato sauce.

fields.name: Chicken Korma
fields.description: A rich Mughlai dish where chicken is slow-cooked in a mild, aromatic sauce made of yogurt, cream, and nut pastes.

fields.name: Thai Green/Red Curry
fields.description: Chicken cooked with coconut milk, bamboo shoots, and a vibrant paste of fresh herbs and chilies.

fields.name: Tandoori Chicken
fields.description: Whole or bone-in chicken pieces marinated in yogurt and fiery spices, then roasted in a clay oven (tandoor).

fields.name: Chicken Tikka
fields.description: Boneless cubes of chicken marinated in spices and yogurt, skewered, and grilled to perfection.

fields.name: Roast Chicken
fields.description: A whole chicken seasoned with butter, garlic, herbs (like rosemary or thyme), and baked in an oven until the skin is crispy.

fields.name: Chicken 65
fields.description: A spicy, deep-fried South Indian appetizer coated in curry leaves, yogurt, and red chilies.

fields.name: Chicken Biryani
fields.description: An aromatic dish made by layering partially cooked basmati rice over a rich, spiced chicken gravy, then slow-cooking (dum).

fields.name: Paneer Curry
fields.description: Cottage cheese cubes cooked in various bases, like creamy tomato (Paneer Butter Masala), spinach (Palak Paneer), or bell pepper gravy (Kadai Paneer).

fields.name: Veg Biryani
fields.description: Layered, slow-cooked (dum) aromatic Basmati rice with spiced vegetables and herbs.

fields.name: Veg Pulao
fields.description: A quick, one-pot dish where rice and vegetables are seasoned gently with whole spices like cardamom and cloves.

fields.name: Green Salad
fields.description: Sliced cucumbers, tomatoes, carrots, and onions served with a squeeze of lemon juice.

fields.name: Veg Zinger Burger
fields.description: The signature vegetarian burger featuring a crispy, spicy vegetable patty topped with fresh lettuce and creamy mayonnaise.

fields.name: Paneer Zinger Burger
fields.description: A premium variation made with a thick, juicy, fried cottage cheese (paneer) slab coated in fiery spices.

fields.name: Spicy Veg Krisper
fields.description: A budget-friendly, compact burger containing a smaller crispy vegetable patty, tangy sauce, and lettuce.

fields.name: Chatpata Chana Burger
fields.description: A flavorful burger made with a spiced chickpea patty paired with regional tangy sauces.

fields.name: French Fries
fields.description: Classic salted or peri-peri sprinkled potato fries served crisp.

fields.name: Aloo Tikki Burger
fields.description: A heavily localized South Asian favorite featuring a spiced, deep-fried mashed potato patty, often topped with sweet and tangy chutneys.

fields.name: Veg Veggie Patty
fields.description: A mix of finely chopped vegetables like carrots, peas, corn, and potatoes bound together with breadcrumbs and fried until crisp.

fields.name: Mushroom Burger
fields.description: A hearty, earthy option made from mashed black beans, kidney beans, or minced portobello mushrooms blended with grains like quinoa.

fields.name: Egg Roll
fields.description: A thicker, American-Chinese adaptation of the spring roll using an egg-based dough wrapper, resulting in a blistered, crunchy exterior when deep-fried.

fields.name: Chicken Kathi Roll
fields.description: The classic Kolkata style. Succulent chunks of chicken tikka are tossed with sliced onions, green chilies, and lime juice, then wrapped inside a flaky, layered lachha paratha (often lined with a fried egg).

fields.name: Fried Chicken Momos
fields.description: Steamed momos that are deep-fried or shallow pan-fried (Kothey Momos) to give them a crispy, golden skin while keeping the inside tender.
